one_liner: Smartsheet offers a comprehensive REST API (OAuth2 or personal access tokens) plus an official MCP server, but API access requires a paid Business/Enterprise/Advanced Work Management plan.

auth_methods.notes: 3-legged OAuth 2.0 flow for third-party apps requiring user consent; Bearer token used in Authorization header.
Personal access token generated via Smartsheet UI (Personal Settings) for machine-to-machine integrations; used as Bearer token.

self_serve_notes: No free tier for API access; requires Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plan. Once on a qualifying plan, developers can self-serve generate a personal access token via Personal Settings or implement OAuth2 without needing sales approval.

api_surface.notes: Full REST API (base https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0) with OpenAPI spec covering sheets, rows, workspaces, users, alternate emails, etc. SDKs available in multiple languages (Java, C#, PHP, Go, Ruby, R, Python, Node.js/JS).

main_blocker: API access is gated behind a paid Business/Enterprise/Advanced Work Management plan; no free-tier self-serve credentials.

evidence.supports: OAuth2 and API access token (Bearer) authentication methods
Personal access token generation and API restricted to Business/Enterprise plans
No free tier includes API access; requires paid plan
Official Smartsheet MCP server with regional URLs (US/EU/AU) and token-based auth
